title: Reset Device - Restore Defaults - Restore - No
scenario: Tapping "No" on the Restore Defaults confirmation popup closes the popup without resetting and keeps user on Device Settings screen
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Scroll down and tap 'Reset Device' option
Observe the confirmation popup that appears
expected: A confirmation popup appears with the message "Are you sure you want to restore to default settings?" and two buttons: "No" and "Yes". Tapping "No" closes the popup without resetting the device, and the user remains on the same Device Settings screen.
